archetype: Archetype 7: Electric & Neon (Adapted for Technical Audio Tool)
vibe: Synthetic, energetic, highly functional, precise command-center

headings.strategy: Wide Display Sans, tech-forward, high contrast weights

body.strategy: Sterile Mono Body for timecodes, structural data, and technical UI elements

components.timeline_container: w-full overflow-x-auto relative min-h-[300px] border border-zinc-800 bg-zinc-900/50 rounded-none
components.track_row: h-32 border-b border-zinc-800/50 relative flex items-center

borders_and_radii.style: Retro-Futurism / Technical Grid borders. 1px solid strokes, exposed grid skeletons.

surfaces_and_effects.header: Solid Background (bg-zinc-950) with hard bottom border (border-zinc-800). No glassmorphism to preserve high-contrast data readability.
surfaces_and_effects.cards_and_panels: Flat backgrounds, 1px subtle border (border-zinc-800), no drop shadows. Focus on pure 2D data clarity.
surfaces_and_effects.interactive_blocks: Song structural blocks should have slight inner shadows or 1px bright borders to appear 'grabbable' for drag & drop.
surfaces_and_effects.hover_effects: Slight lift (-translate-y-[1px]) or border brightness increase. Do not rely on soft shadows.

components_instructions.buttons: Use Shadcn Button. Override radius to rounded-none. Primary buttons use bg-yellow-400 text-black hover:bg-yellow-300. Secondary use border-zinc-800 hover:bg-zinc-800.
components_instructions.inputs_and_forms: Use Shadcn Input/Slider. Override to dark mode specifics (bg-zinc-900 border-zinc-800). Sliders for volume/playback should use accent-yellow-400.
components_instructions.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react (Weight: regular or duotone for active states). It fits dense dashboards well.
components_instructions.waveform_visualizer: Do not use generic Shadcn cards for the timeline. Build custom HTML/Tailwind layered divs. Background: repeating linear gradients for timecode markers. Foreground: draggable colored blocks representing song segments.
components_instructions.modals_dialogs: Use Shadcn Dialog for the Export/Restructure settings. Dark backdrop (bg-black/80), strict border on modal (border-zinc-800).

motion_and_interactions.hover: Instant or very fast transitions (duration-150) to feel highly responsive.
motion_and_interactions.drag_and_drop: While dragging, the song block should have opacity-80 and a bright 2px outline (ring-2 ring-yellow-400).
motion_and_interactions.playback: The playhead must transition smoothly using framer-motion or CSS transforms (translate-x) to visualize real-time audio progress.

image_urls.description: Abstract fluid neon lines on dark background. Use selectively with opacity-20 inside empty drop zones or empty timeline.
Dark aesthetic DJ controller closeup for default album art before upload.
Silhouette profile portrait for user account dropdown.

testing_and_accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text on neon structural blocks is highly readable (e.g., text-black on yellow/green blocks, text-white on deep pink/purple).
testing_and_accessibility.data_testid: Mandatory on all play controls, track rows, upload zones, export buttons, and structural blocks.
testing_and_accessibility.aria: Add aria-labels to all icon-only buttons (Play, Pause, Skip, Loop).

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react framer-motion
Configure Tailwind for Dark mode by default and add the custom font families (Outfit, IBM Plex Mono).
Build the dashboard strictly following the 'Control Room' Grid layout. Left panel for library/uploads, main wide area for the multi-track timeline.
Create the 'Structural Blocks' (Intro, Verse, Chorus) as distinct visually colored units using the accents palette provided. These blocks must be visually draggable.
For the waveform, mock the visualizer with dense, repeating vertical bars or use a canvas library if explicitly required by audio processing logic, but prioritize UI layout first.
Use pure sharp rectangles (rounded-none) and visible 1px borders (border-zinc-800) for all containers. Do not use standard rounded cards or soft shadows.
